/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -undefined dynamic_lookup -o Release/libRestPlugin.dylib -install_name @rpath/libRestPlugin.dylib CMakeFiles/RestPlugin.dir/RestPlugin_macOS.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/../Frameworks /Users/tanmayagarwal/Downloads/CLO_SDK_v2025.2.368_Mac/CLOAPIInterface/Lib/libCLOAPIInterface.dylib
